metadata.description: Official KOCA AIP RKPC AD CHART 2-20 MVA sector boundary linework and altitude labels extracted from the PDF vector/text layer.
metadata.source_chart: RKPC AD CHART 2-20 ATC SURVEILLANCE MINIMUM ALTITUDE CHART - ICAO
limitations: This layer is exact chart linework for display and comparison.
It is not yet polygonized for point-in-sector containment or controller decision logic.
Label positions come from PDF text bbox centers and may need UI declutter offsets later.
